hero.title: Industrial Insulation — Manufactured in the UAE, Engineered for the GCC
hero.subtitle: Cellular glass, mineral wool, and complete insulation systems for oil & gas, LNG, power generation, and industrial construction. Produced in Dubai South. Certified to ASTM, EN, and ISO standards.

products.title: IPS insulation product portfolio
products.subtitle: IPS Middle East develops and supplies a focused range of industrial insulation products designed for demanding environments and critical infrastructure across the GCC.

cellularGlass.name: Cellular Glass (Foam Glass)
cellularGlass.short: Rigid, closed-cell, noncombustible insulation. Zero water absorption, non-combustible, rated from -196°C to +450°C. For pipelines, pressure vessels, and cryogenic systems.
cellularGlass.description: IPS Cellular Glass is a rigid, inorganic insulation material produced from 100% glass. Its closed-cell structure provides total resistance to water, vapor, and most chemicals. Non-combustible and dimensionally stable, cellular glass performs reliably across both cryogenic and high-temperature applications.

mineralWool.name: Mineral Wool
mineralWool.short: High-density fire-resistant thermal and acoustic insulation for power plants, petrochemical facilities, and industrial construction.
mineralWool.description: IPS Mineral Wool is a high-density insulation material produced from natural basalt rock. It provides superior thermal, fire, and acoustic performance for industrial and building applications across a wide range of operating conditions.

stainlessAccessories.name: Stainless Steel Accessories
stainlessAccessories.short: AISI 304/316 fasteners, supports, and banding systems with high corrosion resistance for long-term performance on onshore and offshore facilities.
stainlessAccessories.description: Complete range of stainless steel bands, buckles, clips, studs, washers, fasteners, brackets, clamps, spacers, and support systems for industrial insulation cladding. Available in AISI 304 and AISI 316 grade stainless steel.

specs.typesValue: Bands, buckles, clips, studs, washers, fasteners, brackets, clamps, spacers

coatings.name: Coatings & Jacketing
coatings.short: Protective mastics, vapor barriers, and metal claddings for complete, fully weatherproofed insulation systems.
coatings.description: IPS ME provides complementary materials for insulation system integrity and long-term performance. Our coatings, mastics, and adhesives ensure vapor sealing, corrosion protection, and weather resistance.

specs.typesValue: Protective coatings, mastics & sealants, vapor barrier sheets, adhesives, jacketing materials

services.title: Engineering Support Across the Full Project Lifecycle
services.subtitle: Our team works alongside EPC contractors and plant operators — from early-stage design through to site installation.

designCalc.name: Design & Calculation
designCalc.description: Engineering calculations performed to define insulation system configuration based on operating temperature, process parameters, and environmental conditions.
designCalc.aiText: The process is enhanced by AI-assisted drawing analysis and automated Material Take-Off (MTO) generation, improving accuracy and delivery speed.

scope.title: Scope of Work
scope.description: All calculations comply with ASTM, EN, and ISO standards and are tailored to project specifications.
items: Calculation of insulation thickness based on process parameters and heat transfer rates
Evaluation of condensation risk and surface temperature compliance
Cryogenic and hot system design (LNG, process, and utility systems)
Structural analysis for load-bearing insulation applications
Preparation of technical reports for project documentation

about.title:
Built on expertise.
Manufactured locally. Trusted regionally.
about.subtitle: Since 2021, IPS Middle East has operated as the UAE's dedicated manufacturer of cellular glass insulation — combining 30 years of accumulated engineering knowledge with production in Dubai South to serve oil & gas, LNG, and power generation projects across the GCC.

mission.text: To design, manufacture, and deliver reliable, innovative, and sustainable insulation systems that enhance safety, efficiency, and performance in industrial environments across the Middle East.

vision.text: Become the first-choice insulation partner for every major industrial project in GCC by combining global expertise with local agility.

items.title: Quality and Reliability
items.description: Every product manufactured by IPS ME is tested and certified according to ASTM and EN standards. Our quality management system guarantees consistent performance, traceability, and long-term reliability.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: IPS ME is committed to eco-efficient production. Our processes are designed to minimize waste, optimize energy use, and reduce environmental impact.

items.title: Engineering Expertise
items.description: IPS ME combines production capabilities with in-depth technical knowledge, offering clients integrated solutions — from material selection to project implementation.

items.title: Local Partnership
items.description: By producing in the UAE, IPS ME ensures fast project turnaround, supply chain stability, and insulation solutions tailored to the specific conditions and requirements of GCC projects.

globalNetwork.title: Global Network
globalNetwork.subtitle: IPS Group operates as a coordinated international network — ensuring consistent engineering standards and reliable project execution across regions.

cellularGlass.name: Cellular Glass (Foam Glass)
cellularGlass.overviewText: IPS Cellular Glass is a rigid, inorganic insulation material produced from 100% glass. Its closed-cell structure provides total resistance to water, vapor, and most chemicals. Non-combustible and dimensionally stable, cellular glass performs reliably across both cryogenic and high-temperature applications.
applicationsList: LNG terminals and cryogenic pipelines (down to −196°C)
Roofing, storage tanks, and industrial foundations
supplyFormsList: Slabs, pipe sections, and custom segments
designGuidanceList: All joints must be sealed with compatible vapor-barrier mastics
For stainless steel systems, verify chloride ion content per ASTM C871
Support loads must be distributed using appropriate bearing structures
Always use correct adhesives and jacketing materials for the operating temperature range
installationNotesList: Can be cut on site using standard hand tools
Handle carefully to avoid edge damage — material is rigid but brittle
Follow IPS Installation Guidelines and product datasheets

mineralWool.name: Mineral Wool
mineralWool.overviewText: IPS Mineral Wool is a high-density insulation material produced from natural basalt rock. It provides superior thermal, fire, and acoustic performance for industrial and building applications across a wide range of operating conditions.
applicationsList: Fire protection for structural systems and walls
mineralWool.supplyFormsFootnote: All products comply with ASTM C592 and EN 14303 standards.

stainlessAccessories.name: Stainless Accessories

subProducts.title: Bands, buckles, and clips — AISI 304 / 316
subProducts.textHtml: IPS supplies AISI 304 and AISI 316 stainless steel bands, buckles, and clips for securing insulation cladding and protective jacketing in industrial environments. These corrosion-resistant fastening systems are designed for high-temperature applications, offshore humidity, and the aggressive chemical conditions common across GCC facilities.

subProducts.title: Studs, washers, and fasteners
subProducts.textHtml: Precision-manufactured threaded studs, washers, nuts, bolts, and fastening components for industrial insulation and mechanical systems. Produced in AISI 304 and 316 stainless steel, engineered for structural integrity and corrosion resistance in high-temperature and coastal environments.

subProducts.title: Brackets, clamps, and spacers
subProducts.textHtml: A range of stainless steel brackets, pipe clamps, and spacers designed to support insulation systems and pipeline assemblies — maintaining proper spacing, alignment, and load distribution within industrial installations.

subProducts.title: Support systems for pipelines and vessels
subProducts.textHtml: Industrial support assemblies for pipelines, vessels, and process equipment — ensuring safe load distribution and structural stability. Designed to accommodate thermal expansion, vibration, and high operational loads in demanding service conditions.

featuresList: Suitable for marine, coastal, and offshore installations
Easy integration with IPS insulation materials
stainlessAccessories.complianceText1: All stainless steel components are manufactured in accordance with ASTM A240 and ASTM A276 standards, ensuring certified chemical composition, mechanical strength, and corrosion resistance.

complianceList.title: ASTM A240
complianceList.desc: covers chromium and chromium-nickel stainless steel plate, sheet, and strip for pressure vessels and industrial applications.

complianceList.title: ASTM A276
complianceList.desc: specifies requirements for stainless steel bars and shapes used in structural and mechanical systems.

stainlessAccessories.complianceText2: Compliance with these international standards guarantees material traceability, durability in high-temperature environments, and suitability for refinery, petrochemical, and energy sector applications across the GCC.

coatings.name: Coatings & Ancillaries
coatings.overviewText:
IPS ME provides complementary materials for insulation system integrity and long-term performance.
Our coatings, mastics, and adhesives ensure vapor sealing, corrosion protection, and weather resistance.

productTypesList.title: Protective Coatings:
productTypesList.desc: Liquid-applied barriers for metal and non-metal surfaces.

productTypesList.title: Mastics & Sealants:
productTypesList.desc: For sealing insulation joints and seams.

productTypesList.title: Jacketing Materials:
productTypesList.desc: Aluminum, stainless steel, and composite cladding options.

coatings.applicationsText: Used in combination with IPS Cellular Glass and Mineral Wool systems for complete insulation protection.
